name: building-blocks
description: Building Blocks are FLAC3D-only structured 3D mesh objects used to build, refine, group, and export 3D block meshes before zone generation.
compatibility_notes: FLAC2D 9.0 rejects 'building-blocks ...' commands at the parser level ('Bad conversion of parameter number 1 (building-blocks)'). 'zone generate from-building-blocks' is also rejected by FLAC2D — only 'zone generate from-sketch' is accepted in 2D.
FLAC3D 9.0 'zone generate ?' valid forms: from-building-blocks, from-geometry, from-sketch, from-topography.
Use sketch-workflow for FLAC2D zone generation.
Sketch can send fully structured FLAC3D sketches to Building Blocks.
binary_validation_notes: Top-level 'building-blocks ?' in FLAC3D 9.0 returns these five subcommands: block / edge / face / point / set.
'building-blocks set ?' subcommands include: arrest-triangle, automatic-zone, break-angle, create, delete, export, geometry, import, list, select, validate-all.

Subcommands 'building-blocks block / edge / point / face' do NOT accept a '?' help token directly ('Unused extra parameter 3 (?)') — they require a real subcommand and arguments. Probe via 'building-blocks <kw> create ?' or similar.
validation_notes: Check block quality and grouping before zone generation.
Use structured meshes where local refinement or hexahedral control matters.
Do not expose this workflow for FLAC2D product-filtered sessions.
